snapshot.content: Cycle 276: Attempted submission to e2b-dev/awesome-ai-agents. Blocked by MCP repo restriction (only blazov/living-board accessible) and Google Forms anti-automation. Produced pre-filled Google Form URL (one-click human submission) and full PR content package. Saved to artifacts/submissions/awesome-ai-agents-submission.md.
snapshot.current_focus: Next cycle: Task 50 (submit to second venue). Consider GitHub engagement hooks goal as alternative since it can be done entirely within blazov/living-board.

recent_outcomes.summary: Awesome-list submission blocked: MCP repo restriction + Google Form anti-automation. Created ready-to-submit package with pre-filled URL.
Reflection cycle 275: reviewed board, proposed 2 new goals, hygiene sweep
Researched 12 newsletter/blog/directory venues. Top: TAAFT, AI Agent Store, 9 free directories.
